title: Pressure mounting on Ajax manager John Heitinga after 2-0 defeat against AZ at home
title_zh: 主场 0-2 负于 AZ 后，阿贾克斯主教练约翰·海廷加压力倍增
description: Ajax suffered a 2–0 home defeat to AZ on Saturday, with the visitors exploiting two defensive lapses from John Heitinga’s team before the interval.
description_zh: 周六，阿贾克斯主场以 0-2 负于阿尔克马尔，客队在半场结束前利用了约翰·海廷加 (John Heitinga) 球队的两次防守失误。

title: Dutch government warns of multi-billion euro shortfall in infrastructure funding
title_zh: 荷兰政府警告基础设施资金缺口达数十亿欧元
description: The Dutch government has warned that far more long-term funding is needed for major infrastructure projects, citing recent years’ reliance on short-term, ad hoc funding for individual projects rath
description_zh: 荷兰政府警告称，大型基础设施项目需要更多的长期资金，理由是近年来荷兰政府对单个项目的短期、临时资金的依赖超过了

title: Frontal collision in Lierop: car driver tests positive for drugs
title_zh: 利罗普发生正面碰撞：汽车司机药检呈阳性
description: A frontal collision between a van and two cars on Somerenseweg in Lierop left vehicles damaged but no serious injuries, police reported Saturday.
description_zh: 警方周六报告称，一辆货车与两辆汽车在利罗普的 Somerenseweg 发生正面碰撞，造成车辆受损，但无人受伤。

title: Security tightened ahead of "high-risk" PSV-Napoli match Tuesday
title_zh: 周二埃因霍温对阵那不勒斯的比赛“高风险”前，安保措施加强
description: Authorities in Eindhoven have expanded security measures ahead of Tuesday’s Champions League match between PSV and Napoli, including preventive police searches in parts of the city,
description_zh: 埃因霍温当局在周二埃因霍温对阵那不勒斯的欧冠比赛前加强了安保措施，包括在城市部分地区进行预防性警察搜查，

title: Groningen facility for intellectually disabled suspends worker over sexual misconduct
title_zh: 格罗宁根智障机构员工因性行为不当被停职
description: De Zijlen, a care institution for people with intellectual disabilities in Tolbert, has placed an employee on administrative leave following a report of sexually inappropriate behavior, the organiz
description_zh: 德齐伦 (De Zijlen) 是托尔伯特一家专门为智障人士提供的护理机构，该机构已要求一名员工行政休假，原因是该员工被举报存在不当性行为。

title: Extinction Rebellion blocks A7 on Afsluitdijk, one arrested for assaulting an officer
title_zh: 灭绝叛乱组织封锁阿夫鲁戴克大堤上的 A7 公路，一人因袭击警察被捕
description: The Afsluitdijk reopened Saturday afternoon after climate activists from Extinction Rebellion (XR) blocked the highway, authorities said.
description_zh: 当局表示，在“灭绝叛乱”（XR）气候活动人士封锁高速公路后，阿夫鲁戴克大堤于周六下午重新开放。

title: Nearly 900,000 Dutch citizens abroad have minimal impact on Tweede Kamer elections
title_zh: 近 90 万荷兰海外公民对荷兰议会选举影响甚微
description: Nearly 890,000 Dutch citizens living abroad could influence the Tweede Kamer elections, but only a small fraction vote, reducing their impact to one or two of 150 seats,
description_zh: 近 89 万居住在国外的荷兰公民可能会影响荷兰议会选举，但只有一小部分人参与投票，这使得他们的影响范围缩小到 150 个席位中的一两个。

title: Amsterdam civil servant linked to nearly 100 violent incidents
title_zh: 阿姆斯特丹公务员涉嫌近百起暴力事件
description: A 57-year-old Amsterdam council employee accused of corruption has been linked to at least 95 violent incidents across the Netherlands,...
description_zh: 一名 57 岁的阿姆斯特丹市议会雇员被指控腐败，与荷兰各地至少 95 起暴力事件有关……

title: Hundreds gather for Amsterdam’s second “No Kings” protest
title_zh: 数百人聚集阿姆斯特丹参加第二次“拒绝国王”抗议活动
description: A couple of hundred protestors gathered in Amsterdam’s Museumplein to stage a “No Kings” demonstration on Saturday in support of...
description_zh: 周六，数百名抗议者聚集在阿姆斯特丹博物馆广场举行“反对国王”示威活动，以支持……

title: Election watch: VVD says no again; fewer women candidates
title_zh: 选举观察：自民党再次拒绝；女性候选人减少
description: With 11 days left to the Dutch general election, here is a round-up of Saturday’s main election news:  Yesilgöz again...
description_zh: 距离荷兰大选还有 11 天，以下是周六主要选举新闻的汇总：耶希尔格兹再次……

title: Dutch intelligence services now share less information with US
title_zh: 荷兰情报部门现在与美国分享的信息减少
description: The Dutch intelligence services are sharing less information with the United States and working more closely with European partners, AIVD...
description_zh: 荷兰情报部门正在减少与美国的信息共享，并与欧洲合作伙伴 AIVD 进行更紧密的合作……

title: 16-year-old referee assaulted during a soccer match in Geldrop; 19-year-old arrested
title_zh: 一名 16 岁的裁判在盖尔德罗普的一场足球比赛中遭到袭击；一名 19 岁的裁判被捕
description: A 16-year-old referee was assaulted Friday night during his first official indoor soccer match in Geldrop, prompting a police response with four vehicles and the arrest of a 19-year-old suspect fro
description_zh: 周五晚上，一名 16 岁的裁判在盖尔德罗普的首场正式室内足球比赛中遭到袭击，警方出动了四辆车，并逮捕了一名 19 岁的嫌疑人

title: VVD rules out joining left-leaning cabinet with GroenLinks-PvdA, CDA, and D66
title_zh: VVD 拒绝加入与绿色左翼党、CDA 和 D66 组成的左翼内阁
description: The VVD will not join a cabinet with GroenLinks-PvdA, the CDA, and D66, caretaker Defense Minister Ruben Brekelmans said, emphasizing that “this entire bloc” would constitute a left-wing government
description_zh: 看守国防部长鲁本·布雷克曼斯表示，自民党不会加入由绿色左翼-工党、基督教民主联盟和民主66党组成的内阁，并强调“整个联盟”将组成一个左翼政府。

title: One injured in shooting in Amsterdam shopping area; Suspect arrested nearby
title_zh: 阿姆斯特丹购物区发生枪击事件，一人受伤；嫌疑人在附近被捕
description: A shooting at the Buikslotermeerplein shopping area in Amsterdam left one person injured on Saturday afternoon, and police quickly arrested a suspect in the vicinity, authorities said.
description_zh: 当局称，周六下午，阿姆斯特丹 Buikslotermeerplein 购物区发生枪击事件，造成一人受伤，警方迅速在附近逮捕了一名嫌疑人。

title: Prosecutors link Amsterdam official to 95 violent crimes, including attempted murders
title_zh: 检察官将阿姆斯特丹官员与 95 起暴力犯罪联系起来，其中包括谋杀未遂
description: A municipal employee from Amsterdam has been linked to at least 95 violent incidents across the Netherlands, prosecutors said during a preliminary hearing against the 57-year-old man and two co-def
description_zh: 检察官在对这名 57 岁男子和两名被告的初步听证会上表示，阿姆斯特丹一名市政雇员涉嫌与荷兰各地至少 95 起暴力事件有关

title: 20-year-old from Zwolle apprehended after police chase
title_zh: 兹沃勒 20 岁男子在警方追捕后被捕
description: A 20-year-old man from Zwolle was arrested after attempting to flee police during a speed control on the Zwartewaterallee,
description_zh: 一名来自兹沃勒的 20 岁男子在 Zwartewaterallee 限速期间试图逃避警察追捕，随后被捕。

title: Dutch intelligence services cut back on sharing information with U.S
title_zh: 荷兰情报部门减少与美国的信息共享
description: The Dutch intelligence services AIVD and MIVD have reduced the amount of information they share with their American counterparts, citing political developments in the United States under President
description_zh: 荷兰情报机构 AIVD 和 MIVD 减少了与美国同行共享的信息量，理由是美国总统特朗普执政期间美国的政治发展

title: Dutch inflation higher than eurozone as prices stay high despite slower wage growth
title_zh: 尽管工资增长放缓，但物价仍居高不下，荷兰通胀率高于欧元区
description: Dutch inflation continues to outpace the eurozone average, reaching around 3 percent compared with roughly 2 percent across the bloc, De Nederlandsche Bank (DNB) President Olaf Sleijpen said Thursd
description_zh: 荷兰央行 (DNB) 行长 Olaf Sleijpen 周四表示，荷兰通胀率继续超过欧元区平均水平，达到 3% 左右，而欧元区整体通胀率约为 2%。

title: Two injured, one seriously, in Oisterwijk stabbing; Police arrest suspect
title_zh: 奥斯特维克刺伤事件造成两人受伤，其中一人伤势严重；警方逮捕嫌疑人
description: Two people were injured, one of them seriously, in a stabbing early Saturday morning in Oisterwijk, near Tilburg, RTL
description_zh: 据RTL报道，周六凌晨，蒂尔堡附近的奥斯特韦克发生一起刺伤事件，造成两人受伤，其中一人伤势严重。

title: Man arrested after beating woman who confronted teens over fireworks in Raamsdonksveer
title_zh: 拉姆斯东克斯费尔一名男子因与青少年因烟花爆竹发生冲突而殴打一名女子，随后被捕
description: Police in Noord-Brabant arrested a man on Friday afternoon, suspected of assaulting a woman who had been walking her dog in Raamsdonksveer earlier this week.
description_zh: 周五下午，北布拉班特省警方逮捕了一名男子，他涉嫌本周早些时候在拉姆斯东克斯费尔袭击一名遛狗的女子。

title: Germany’s €500 billion infrastructure plan threatens Dutch construction costs
title_zh: 德国5000亿欧元基础设施计划威胁荷兰建设成本
description: The Netherlands’ plans for roads, bridges, and rail projects are facing pressure as Germany launches a massive 500 billion euros infrastructure program, economists warn.
description_zh: 经济学家警告称，随着德国启动一项耗资 5000 亿欧元的大规模基础设施计划，荷兰的道路、桥梁和铁路项目计划面临压力。

title: Two employees injured in armed robbery at Rotterdam tobacco shop
title_zh: 鹿特丹烟草店发生持枪抢劫，两名员工受伤
description: Two employees were injured Friday evening when armed robbers stormed a tobacco shop on Bergweg in Rotterdam,
description_zh: 周五晚上，武装劫匪袭击了鹿特丹 Bergweg 的一家烟草店，造成两名店员受伤。

title: Regulators push for stricter controls on drug prices amid rising healthcare costs
title_zh: 医疗成本上涨，监管机构要求对药品价格进行更严格的控制
description: Health authorities in the Netherlands are calling for stricter government action to ensure drug prices remain socially acceptable amid rising healthcare costs,
description_zh: 荷兰卫生当局呼吁政府采取更严格的措施，确保在医疗成本不断上涨的情况下，药品价格保持在社会可接受的范围内。

title: Two care institute workers suspended for sexual abuse of clients with mental disability
title_zh: 两名护理机构工作人员因对精神残疾客户进行性虐待而被停职
description: The care facility De Zijlen has suspended two employees for sexually inappropriate behavior toward at least one client.
description_zh: 德齐伦护理机构的两名员工因对至少一名顾客做出不当性行为而被停职。

title: Syrian-Dutch citizens launch "We Rise" to make their voice heard in migration debate
title_zh: 叙利亚裔荷兰公民发起“我们崛起”运动，在移民辩论中发出自己的声音
description: A group of Syrian-Dutch citizens has come together because they want to have a voice in the migration debate.
description_zh: 一群叙利亚裔荷兰公民聚集在一起，因为他们希望在移民辩论中发出自己的声音。

title: Complaining neighbors must not outweigh kids' right to play outside: Jantje Beton
title_zh: 抱怨邻居不应凌驾于孩子在户外玩耍的权利之上：Jantje Beton
description: Municipalities need to stop forbidding children from playing in certain areas outside, the organization Jantje Beton has said.
description_zh: Jantje Beton 组织表示，市政当局需要停止禁止儿童在户外某些区域玩耍。

title: Environmental groups file request to halt Schiphol A-Pier construction
title_zh: 环保组织申请停止史基浦机场A号码头建设
description: Mobilization for the Environment (MOB), SchipholWatch, and Greenpeace Netherlands are calling for construction on Schiphol’s new A-pier to be stopped, claiming the project lacks the necessary envir
description_zh: 环境动员组织 (MOB)、史基浦观察组织和荷兰绿色和平组织呼吁停止史基浦机场新 A 码头的建设，声称该项目缺乏必要的环境

title: Election security in steady hands, ministers say amid recent threats
title_zh: 近期威胁频发，部长们表示选举安全稳固
description: Ministers Foort van Oosten (Justice) and Frank Rijkaart (Interior) say the caretaker cabinet is already taking all necessary measures to keep the upcoming parliamentary elections safe.
description_zh: 司法部长 Foort van Oosten 和内政部长 Frank Rijkaart 表示，看守内阁已经采取一切必要措施，确保即将举行的议会选举安全进行。

title: Main suspect in 2002 fatal Amsterdam shooting extradited to the Netherlands from U.S.
title_zh: 2002 年阿姆斯特丹枪击案主要嫌疑人从美国引渡回荷兰
description: A 54-year-old man suspected of involvement in a fatal 2002 shooting was extradited from the United States to the Netherlands on Thursday, the Public Prosecution Service (OM) said.
description_zh: 荷兰检察院称，一名涉嫌参与 2002 年致命枪击案的 54 岁男子于周四从美国被引渡到荷兰。

title: Podcast: The Ratterdam Night Watch Edition
title_zh: 播客：《拉特丹夜巡》版
description: Want to support the DutchNews podcast and keep up our stocks of stroopwafels and orange tompouces? Click here to become...
description_zh: 想要支持 DutchNews 播客并持续供应我们的荷兰焦糖华夫饼和橙子番茄酱吗？点击此处成为……

title: Mayor orders six-month closure of Amsterdam warehouse linked to cocaine shipment
title_zh: 市长下令关闭与可卡因运输有关的阿姆斯特丹仓库六个月
description: A warehouse in Amsterdam has been closed for six months by Mayor Femke Halsema after authorities discovered that a shipment of 1,200 kilos of cocaine intercepted in August
description_zh: 阿姆斯特丹市长 Femke Halsema 关闭了一座仓库六个月，因为当局发现 8 月份截获了一批 1,200 公斤可卡因

title: China's export ban on Nexperia chips based on incorrect assumptions, Dutch Min. says
title_zh: 荷兰财政部称中国对 Nexperia 芯片的出口禁令基于错误假设
description: The Chinese government acted based on incorrect assumptions when it imposed export restrictions on chip manufacturer Nexperia in response to the Dutch government intervening in the compan
description_zh: 中国政府对芯片制造商 Nexperia 实施出口限制，以回应荷兰政府干预该公司，这是基于错误的假设。

title: Farmer finds body beneath Schiphol flight path; Police suspect fall from a plane
title_zh: 农民在史基浦机场航线下方发现尸体；警方怀疑其从飞机上坠落
description: A body was discovered Thursday evening in a field on Hoofdweg in Abbenes, located under a flight path to Schiphol Airport.
description_zh: 周四晚上，在阿贝内斯 Hoofdweg 的一块田地里发现了一具尸体，该田地位于飞往史基浦机场的航线下方。

title: Minister to talk with China to lift export ban on Nexperia chips
title_zh: 部长将与中国谈判解除Nexperia芯片出口禁令
description: Caretaker economic affairs minister Vincent Karremans says he wants to work with China to find a solution to the Chinese...
description_zh: 看守经济事务部长文森特·卡雷曼斯 (Vincent Karremans) 表示，他希望与中国合作，找到解决中国问题的办法……

title: Dutch multi-day cycling race stage cut short after car ignores stop signs
title_zh: 荷兰多日自行车赛因汽车无视停车标志而被迫缩短赛段
description: The third stage of the Tour of Holland was cut short on Friday after a car failed to obey stop signs.
description_zh: 由于一辆赛车不遵守停车标志，环荷兰自行车赛第三赛段于周五被迫中断。

title: Radboud professor reports Education Min. in escalating conflict over anti-Israel posts
title_zh: 拉德堡德教授报告称，教育部长因反以色列帖子而引发的冲突不断升级
description: Harry Pettit, an assistant professor at Radboud University in Nijmegen, has filed a criminal complaint against the caretaker Minister Gouke Moes of Education (BBB).
description_zh: 奈梅亨拉德堡德大学助理教授哈里·佩蒂特 (Harry Pettit) 已对看守教育部长古克·莫斯 (Gouke Moes) 提起刑事诉讼。

title: 1.2 tonnes of cocaine was heading to Amsterdam Food Centre firm
title_zh: 1.2 吨可卡因正运往阿姆斯特丹食品中心公司
description: A consignment of 1.2 tonnes of cocaine intercepted at the port of Vlissingen in August was destined for a company...
description_zh: 8 月份在弗利辛恩港截获的一批 1.2 吨可卡因原计划运往一家公司……

title: No evidence that Russia pressured Dutch teens suspected of espionage, Prosecutor says
title_zh: 检察官称没有证据表明俄罗斯向涉嫌间谍活动的荷兰青少年施压
description: There is no evidence that Russia pressured theDutch teenagers arrested last monthinto sp
description_zh: 没有证据表明俄罗斯对上个月被捕的荷兰青少年施压，要求他们

title: More minors, foreign workers are victims of human traffickers
title_zh: 越来越多的未成年人和外籍工人成为人口贩卖的受害者
description: The number of reported cases of human trafficking in the Netherlands has risen again, showing a higher level of awareness...
description_zh: 荷兰报告的人口贩卖案件数量再次上升，表明人们的认识水平更高……

title: Three teenagers investigated for suspected spying for Russia
title_zh: 三名青少年因涉嫌为俄罗斯从事间谍活动而接受调查
description: Three 17-year-olds are at the centre of an investigation into alleged spying on behalf of Russia, at least one of...
description_zh: 三名 17 岁少年因涉嫌为俄罗斯从事间谍活动而成为调查对象，其中至少有一人……

title: Police arrest five suspects for threatening to kill, planning an attack on a local
title_zh: 警方逮捕了五名嫌疑人，他们威胁要杀人，并计划袭击当地一家
description: Authorities detained five suspects on Wednesday and Thursday in Rotterdam on suspicion of attempting to carry out an attack.
description_zh: 周三和周四，鹿特丹当局拘留了五名涉嫌企图实施袭击的嫌疑人。

title: Rotterdam dockworkers suspend strike after collective labor agreement is reached
title_zh: 鹿特丹码头工人在达成集体劳动协议后暂停罢工
description: Rotterdam dockworkers have called off their strike after the FNV union and port companies ILS and Matrans reached a tentative agreement on a new collective labor agreement on Thursday.
description_zh: 周四，FNV 工会与港口公司 ILS 和 Matrans 就新的集体劳动协议达成初步协议后，鹿特丹码头工人取消了罢工。

title: Political parties are asking a lot from citizens; Not making long-term plans: SCP
title_zh: SCP：政党对公民要求过高，却没有制定长远计划
description: The political parties are asking a lot from citizens, the Netherlands Institute for Social Research (SCP)
description_zh: 荷兰社会研究所 (SCP) 表示，政党对公民的要求很高

title: Amsterdam city centre most expensive place to park
title_zh: 阿姆斯特丹市中心停车最贵的地方
description: Amsterdam is the most expensive Dutch city to park your car for 24 hours, an investigation into wildly fluctuating street...
description_zh: 阿姆斯特丹是荷兰停车 24 小时费用最高的城市，一项针对剧烈波动的街道停车费的调查显示......

title: Amsterdam PvdA wants to ban international tourists from Red Light District coffeeshops
title_zh: 阿姆斯特丹公共事业管理局希望禁止国际游客进入红灯区咖啡店
description: The PvdA faction in Amsterdam wants to ban international tourists from coffeeshops in the Red Light District and the rest of the city center, Parool
description_zh: 阿姆斯特丹的工党派系希望禁止国际游客进入红灯区和市中心其他地方的咖啡店，Parool

title: Privacy watchdog hands €2.7 m fine to credit score firm Experian
title_zh: 隐私监管机构对信用评分公司 Experian 处以 270 万欧元罚款
description: US credit and data trader Experian has been fined  €2.7 million by the Dutch privacy watchdog AP for illegally collecting...
description_zh: 美国信贷和数据交易商 Experian 因非法收集个人信息被荷兰隐私监管机构 AP 罚款 270 万欧元......

title: Saturday will be sunny, but the grey skies will return next week
title_zh: 周六将是晴天，但下周将再次出现阴天
description: After a week of grey skies and drizzle, the Netherlands can look forward to a rare day of sunshine on...
description_zh: 经过一周的阴天和毛毛雨之后，荷兰终于可以期待难得的阳光灿烂的一天了……

title: Parties want people to “do more” without suggesting how: SCP
title_zh: SCP：政党希望人们“做更多”，但未说明如何做
description: Dutch political parties are calling on people to contribute more to society, but fail to explain how they should combine...
description_zh: 荷兰各政党呼吁人们为社会做出更多贡献，但却未能解释他们应该如何结合起来……

title: Dock workers end their strike at Rotterdam port, pay deal agreed
title_zh: 鹿特丹港码头工人结束罢工，工资协议达成
description: The strike by some dock workers at the port of Rotterdam is officially over after they voted overwhelmingly in favour...
description_zh: 鹿特丹港部分码头工人以压倒性多数投票赞成罢工，罢工正式结束……

title: Two arrested for Alkmaar man's disappearance; Missing a month
title_zh: 阿尔克马尔男子失踪，两人被捕；失踪一个月
description: The police have arrested two men on suspicion of involvement in the disappearance of 25-year-old Tijn from Alkmaar. Tijn has been missing for a month.
description_zh: 警方逮捕了两名男子，他们涉嫌参与阿尔克马尔25岁女子蒂恩（Tijn）的失踪案。蒂恩已失踪一个月。

title: Far fewer trains between Rotterdam & The Hague due to broken rail; Repairs to take days
title_zh: 由于轨道损坏，鹿特丹和海牙之间的列车数量大幅减少；维修需要数天时间
description: Far fewer trains are running between Rotterdam and The Hague do to a damaged track between Schiedam and Delft.
description_zh: 由于斯希丹和代尔夫特之间的轨道受损，鹿特丹和海牙之间运行的列车数量大幅减少。

title: Amsterdam’s PvdA branch wants to ban tourists from coffeeshops
title_zh: 阿姆斯特丹 PvdA 分部希望禁止游客进入咖啡店
description: The Amsterdam branch of the PvdA (Labour party) wants to ban tourists from cannabis cafés in the city centre, marking...
description_zh: 工党阿姆斯特丹分部希望禁止游客进入市中心的大麻咖啡馆，这标志着......

title: Election watch: D66 on the rise, Yesilgöz says no
title_zh: 选举观察：D66 崛起，耶希尔格兹表示反对
description: With 12 days to go before the Dutch general election on October 29, here’s a round-up of today’s election news. ...
description_zh: 距离 10 月 29 日荷兰大选还有 12 天，以下是今天的选举新闻摘要。...

title: The magic of Egypt: mummies take centre stage in Leiden
title_zh: 埃及的魔力：木乃伊成为莱顿的焦点
description: After five years travelling the other side of the world, a blockbuster exhibition on ancient Egypt complete with more than...
description_zh: 经过五年的环球旅行，一场关于古埃及的轰动性展览圆满落幕，展出了超过...

title: D66 rising in the polls as safe choice for dissatisfied voters; Now above VVD
title_zh: D66 在民意调查中上升，成为不满选民的安全选择；目前超过 VVD
description: With two weeks to go before the parliamentary election, the D66 is continuing its gradual climb in the polls.
description_zh: 距离议会选举还有两周时间，D66 在民意调查中的支持率继续稳步攀升。

title: Scrapping mortgage interest deduction won't cause significant house price drop: IMF
title_zh: 国际货币基金组织：取消抵押贷款利息扣除不会导致房价大幅下跌
description: The potential abolition of the mortgage interest deduction in the Netherlands will likely have a price-dampening effect, but won’t cause home prices to suddenly fall sharply.
description_zh: 荷兰可能取消抵押贷款利息扣除，这可能会产生抑制价格的效果，但不会导致房价突然大幅下跌。

title: Human trafficking reports on the rise in the Netherlands; Especially more child victims
title_zh: 荷兰人口贩卖报告呈上升趋势，儿童受害者增多
description: The number of reports of human trafficking in the Netherlands increased again last year, the National Rapporteur on Human Trafficking and Sexual Violence against Children
description_zh: 荷兰人口贩运和儿童性暴力问题国家报告员表示，去年荷兰人口贩运报告数量再次增加

title: Dutch tax loophole for stock buybacks costs treasury billions, study finds
title_zh: 研究发现，荷兰股票回购税收漏洞导致国库损失数十亿美元
description: A tax exemption allowing companies to avoid dividend tax through stock buybacks is far larger than previously estimated, new research shows.
description_zh: 新研究显示，允许公司通过股票回购避免股息税的免税额度远远超出之前的估计。

title: Former Vitesse youth coach sentenced to community service for sexual texts to girl, 16
title_zh: 前维特斯青年队教练因向 16 岁女孩发送性短信被判社区服务
description: A 41-year-old former Vitesse youth coach was handed a 100-hour community service sentence, including 40 hours conditionally suspended, by the Breda court on Thursday for sending
description_zh: 周四，布雷达法院判处一名 41 岁的前维特斯青年队教练 100 小时社区服务，其中包括 40 小时有条件缓刑，罪名是

title: Prosecutor recommends suspended sentence for woman who allegedly set boyfriend on fire
title_zh: 检察官建议对涉嫌纵火焚烧男友的女子判处缓刑
description: The Public Prosecution Service has recommended a one-year conditionally suspended prison sentence for a 26-year-old woman from Zoetermeer, who allegedly set her boyfriend on fire in 2022.
description_zh: 检察机关建议对一名来自祖特尔梅尔的 26 岁女子判处一年缓刑，因为她涉嫌于 2022 年纵火焚烧男友。

title: Plans for asylum shelter in Vlaardingen delayed over bats in the buiding
title_zh: 弗拉尔丁恩庇护所计划因建筑内有蝙蝠而推迟
description: The municipality of Vlaardingen has had to delay plans for an asylum shelter on Zuidbuurtseweg by at least six months. Signs of bats were found in the farmhouse on the site.
description_zh: 弗拉尔丁恩市政府不得不将Zuidbuurtseweg的庇护所建设计划推迟至少六个月。现场的农舍里发现了蝙蝠的踪迹。

title: BBB desperate in appeal to farmers, now also pushing burka ban
title_zh: BBB 迫切呼吁农民，现在也在推动禁止罩袍
description: BBB leader Caroline van der Plas has explicitly warned farmers not to vote for the PVV.
description_zh: BBB 领导人 Caroline van der Plas 明确警告农民不要投票给 PVV。

title: Groningen, Eindhoven universities collaborate with Israeli officer active in military
title_zh: 格罗宁根大学和埃因霍温大学与以色列现役军官合作
description: The University of Groningen (RUG) and Eindhoven University of Technology (TU/e) are collaborating with an Israeli professor who is also an active officer in the Israeli military, Dutch newspaper
description_zh: 据荷兰报纸报道，格罗宁根大学 (RUG) 和埃因霍温理工大学 (TU/e) 正在与一位以色列教授合作，该教授也是以色列军队的现役军官

title: Ministry of Agriculture orders all poultry to be kept indoors amid bird flu spike
title_zh: 禽流感疫情爆发，农业部要求所有家禽必须留在室内
description: The Ministry of Agriculture has ordered all poultry to be kept indoors and enclosed nationwide, effective immediately.
description_zh: 农业部已下令全国范围内所有家禽必须室内圈养，立即生效。

title: European automakers expect chip shortages after Dutch intervene at tech firm Nexperia
title_zh: 荷兰干预科技公司Nexperia后，欧洲汽车制造商预计芯片短缺
description: The conflict surrounding the Nijmegen-based chipmaker Nexperia is affecting nearly all European car manufacturers, according to the European carmakers’ association ACEA.
description_zh: 欧洲汽车制造商协会 ACEA 表示，围绕总部位于奈梅亨的芯片制造商 Nexperia 的冲突影响了几乎所有欧洲汽车制造商。

title: US officials had warned about “problematic” Nexperia in June
title_zh: 美国官员曾在 6 月份对 Nexperia 存在“问题”发出警告。
description: The Dutch government took control of chipmaker Nexperia after months of internal conflict and international concern about its Chinese chief...
description_zh: 在经历了数月的内部冲突以及国际社会对其中国首席执行官的担忧之后，荷兰政府最终控制了芯片制造商 Nexperia......

title: Husband convicted of stabbing wife to death in front of Hardenberg daycare center
title_zh: 丈夫因在哈登贝格日托中心前刺死妻子而被判有罪
description: The court in Zwolle has convicted and sentenced 57-year-old Hans H. from Schoonebeek to 4 years in prison and compulsory psychiatric treatment at a TBS facility for murdering his wife. H.
description_zh: 兹沃勒法院判处来自斯库内贝克的 57 岁汉斯·H 因谋杀妻子而入狱 4 年，并强制在 TBS 机构接受精神病治疗。H.

title: Drents museum art theft suspects stay silent as lawyers seek minister’s testimony
title_zh: 德伦特博物馆艺术品盗窃案嫌疑人保持沉默，律师寻求部长的证词
description: The suspects in theart theft at the Drents Museumin Assen remain silent about their possible involv
description_zh: 阿森德伦茨博物馆艺术品盗窃案的嫌疑人对他们可能参与的案件保持沉默

title: Unemployment rises to 4% in September, highest in four years
title_zh: 9月份失业率升至4%，为四年来最高
description: Unemployment in the Netherlands rose to 4% in September, the highest level in four years, according to new figures from...
description_zh: 根据最新数据显示，荷兰 9 月份失业率升至 4%，为四年来的最高水平……

title: Record 136,000 Dutch citizens abroad to vote in October 29 election
title_zh: 10 月 29 日选举，创纪录的 136,000 名海外荷兰公民将参加投票
description: A record 136,272 Dutch citizens living outside the Netherlands have registered to vote by mail in the upcoming Tweede Kamer election on October 29, according to the municipality of The Hague.
description_zh: 据海牙市政府称，已有创纪录的 136,272 名居住在荷兰境外的荷兰公民登记参加 10 月 29 日举行的 Tweede Kamer 选举的邮寄投票。

title: Two women arrested in Utrecht for dating fraud causing €550,000 in losses
title_zh: 乌得勒支两名女子因约会诈骗被捕，损失 55 万欧元
description: Two women from Utrecht were arrested on Wednesday after dozens of reports alleging that they had committed dating fraud.
description_zh: 周三，两名来自乌得勒支的女子因收到数十份指控其犯有约会诈骗罪的报告而被捕。

title: Health authorities urge caution as new COVID-19 variant spreads in the Netherlands
title_zh: 荷兰新冠变异毒株传播，卫生当局呼吁谨慎
description: Dutch health authorities are urging vigilance after a new COVID-19 subvariant known asStratusbegan spreading across the country, coinciding with an increase in positive COVID-19 test res
description_zh: 荷兰卫生当局敦促保持警惕，因为一种名为 Stratus 的新型 COVID-19 亚变种开始在全国范围内传播，与此同时，COVID-19 检测阳性人数也在增加

title: Type 2 diabetes costs Dutch economy over €1 billion a year
title_zh: 2型糖尿病每年给荷兰经济造成超过10亿欧元的损失
description: Type 2 diabetes costs the Dutch economy more than €1 billion a year, mainly because people with the condition are...
description_zh: 2 型糖尿病每年给荷兰经济造成超过 10 亿欧元的损失，主要是因为患有这种疾病的人......

title: Two women arrested for dating fraud which netted them €550,000
title_zh: 两名女子因约会诈骗被捕，诈骗金额达 55 万欧元
description: Two women from Utrecht have been arrested as part of an investigation into a major dating fraud involving dozens of...
description_zh: 两名来自乌得勒支的妇女因涉嫌参与一起涉及数十人的重大约会诈骗案而被捕......

title: Americans in the Netherlands prepare for No Kings rally
title_zh: 在荷兰的美国人准备参加“拒绝国王”集会
description: On Saturday, Americans will gather on Museumplein in Amsterdam as part of the No Kings protest, a worldwide demonstration opposing...
description_zh: 周六，美国人将聚集在阿姆斯特丹博物馆广场，参加“拒绝国王”抗议活动，这是一场全球性的反对……的示威活动。

title: Security increased for left-wing leader Timmermans after Amsterdam incident
title_zh: 阿姆斯特丹事件后，左翼领导人蒂默曼斯的安保措施加强
description: Frans Timmermans, leader of GroenLinks-PvdA, has received heightened police protection and additional unspecified security following an intimidation incident at an Amsterdam café, he told
description_zh: 绿色左翼-工党领导人弗朗斯·蒂默曼斯在阿姆斯特丹一家咖啡馆发生恐吓事件后，受到了警方加强保护，并增加了未指定的安全措施。

title: Haarlem court rules that cats can go outside, despite danger to birds
title_zh: 哈勒姆法院裁定，尽管对鸟类有危险，但猫仍可外出
description: Domestic cats can continue to roam freely outdoors, the court in Haarlem ruled in a case brought by the Huiskat Thuiskat Foundation.
description_zh: 哈勒姆法院在 Huiskat Thuiskat 基金会提起的诉讼中裁定，家猫可以继续在户外自由漫步。
